---
title: Quantifying isentropic stratosphere-troposphere exchange of ozone
pagetitle: 2016-4-1-Yang2015 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2016
author: Huang Yang, Gang Chen, Qi Tang and Peter G. Hess
venue: 'Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres'
venue_cit: '<i>Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres</i>, 121, 3372--3387,
  doi:10.1002/2015JD024180.'
recommended_citation: 'Huang Yang, Gang Chen, Qi Tang and Peter G. Hess, 2016: Quantifying
  isentropic stratosphere-troposphere exchange of ozone, <i>Journal of Geophysical
  Research: Atmospheres</i>, 121, 3372--3387, doi:10.1002/2015JD024180.'
paper_url: http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/2015JD024180
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Quantifying isentropic stratosphere-troposphere exchange of ozone

*Published in Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres, 2016*

**Recommended citation:** Huang Yang, Gang Chen, Qi Tang and Peter G. Hess, 2016: Quantifying isentropic stratosphere-troposphere exchange of ozone, <i>Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres</i>, 121, 3372--3387, doi:10.1002/2015JD024180.

[Download paper](http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/2015JD024180){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
